description_long: This is a compact, circular stereo sound system with a low-profile, disc-like shape and a matte dark gray finish. The top surface features a finely perforated speaker grille, adorned with several touch-sensitive icons including a microphone, call, and volume controls, each clearly marked with white symbols. Around the edge, there are multiple ports, including USB-C and what appear to be additional USB or audio ports, suggesting versatile connectivity. The device has a subtle, modern aesthetic with no visible physical buttons, relying instead on capacitive touch controls. The underside is slightly beveled, likely to provide stability and acoustic isolation when placed on flat surfaces. Its design is sleek and minimal, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, meeting rooms, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, circular stereo sound system with a matte dark gray finish, touch-sensitive controls, and multiple connectivity ports. The top features a perforated speaker grille with clearly marked icons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main touch controls, microphone icon, and USB-C port on the edge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two blue USB ports and the continuation of the perforated grille.
description_view_2: Side view with a visible extended USB-C cable and touch icons for call and volume.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the call icon and the extended USB-C cable from a different angle.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Dense, uniform circular perforations covering the entire top surface, forming a fine mesh pattern with no decorative elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Touch-sensitive icons arranged around the top edge, including microphone, call, and volume controls, each marked with simple white symbols.
